query_result.reasoning:
The user wants to know how Netflix's Average Revenue Per Paying User (ARPU) has changed from 2019 to 2024. I need to find this data from Netflix's financial reports or SEC filings.

Let me start by searching for Netflix's financial data for this period.

[{"url": "https://breakingintowallstreet.com/kb/venture-capital/average-revenue-per-user", "title": "Average Revenue per User (ARPU): Definition & Calculations", "content": "We could take this $34 billion and divide by 260 million to calculate the Average Revenue per User, but since this Revenue is earned over the course of the year, it is more accurate to use the “Average Paying Memberships” figure below the end-of-period numbers:

Average Revenue per User = $33.7 billion / 240.889 million =$144.05

This means that, on average, each paid member contributed roughly $144.05 to Netflix’s revenue in 2023.", "score": 0.8775715, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://dazeinfo.com/2020/04/22/netflix-average-monthly-revenue-per-streaming-subscribers-by-region-graphfarm", "title": "Netflix Quarterly ARPU by Region: Q1 2018 - Q1 2021 - Dazeinfo", "content": "Last Updated:

# Netflix Quarterly ARPU by Region: Q1 2018 – Q1 2021

The below graph represents the average monthly revenue per paying memberships of Netflix streaming content across different regions. In Q2 2020, Netflix generated an average of $13.25 in revenue per month from each US & Canada subscriber. While ARPU from Latin America region declined to an all-time low.

[expand title=”More Actionable Insights” swaptitle=”Close”]", "score": 0.5798055, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://adlega.com/blog/arpu-average-revenue-per-user", "title": "ARPU: Average Revenue Per User - Adlega Blog", "content": "SaaS Company Example:

 Free users: 9,000
 Basic tier ($10/month): 500
 Premium tier ($25/month): 300
 Enterprise tier ($50/month): 200

Total Revenue = $5,000 + $7,500 + $10,000 = $22,500

Total Users = 9,000 + 500 + 300 + 200 = 10,000

ARPU = $22,500 ÷ 10,000 = $2.25 per user

## Industry Benchmarks

### B2B SaaS

 Enterprise: $100-500/month
 SMB: $40-100/month
 Small business: $10-40/month

### B2C Services

 Streaming: $8-15/month
 Gaming: $1-5/month
 Social apps: $1-3/month", "score": 0.5297749, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.statista.com/statistics/1405310/netflix-amazon-prime-video-content-spending-per-user-arpu", "title": "Netflix/Amazon Prime Video ARPU & content spend 2023 | Statista", "content": "See why Statista is the trusted choice for reliable data and insights. ARPU is an essential metric for Netflix to track because it helps the company understand how much revenue it generates per subscriber. ARPU is an essential metric for Amazon to track", "score": 0.39229083, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.wallstreetprep.com/knowledge/arpu-average-revenue-per-user", "title": "Average Revenue Per User (ARPU) | Formula + Calculator", "content": "From the assumptions listed above, we can see that of the total customer base, 40% are on paid subscription plans whereas 60% are on the “freemium” plan (or are inactive accounts – i.e. a customer created an account but is not actively using it).

If we multiply the average monthly subscription price by the number of users on the paid subscription tier, we arrive at $5 million for our company’s monthly revenue.", "score": 0.38741276, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.metrichq.org/saas/average-revenue-per-user", "title": "Average Revenue Per User (ARPU) | MetricHQ", "content": "Note that ARPU describes the average revenue for all users - paying or not. This is particularly relevant to companies with a freemium model. Whereas, Average Revenue Per Paying User only includes paying users. This metric is used as an indication of revenue generation capability and the ability to meet targets. ## Monetize

# ARPU (Average Revenue Per User)

Average Revenue Per User (ARPU) is a fundamental business metric that measures the average amount of revenue generated by each user of an app or service within a specific timeframe. This key performance indicator helps businesses understand the financial value of their user base, providing critical insights for marketing optimization, product development, and overall business strategy.", "score": 0.29599294, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://deniz-zuhre-colakoglu.medium.com/average-revenue-per-user-arpu-8724016c7a11", "title": "Average Revenue Per User (ARPU).
